'''Dravian Starport''', also known as '''Dravian Station''', was a [[Space station/Legends|space station]] located between the [[Planet/Legends|planets]] [[Cotellier/Legends|Cotellier]] and [[Syned]]. The station was a haven for [[Smuggler/Legends|smugglers]] because it was a great distance from any inhabited [[Star system/Legends|systems]]. Due to the types of people that frequented Dravian Starport, the space station eventually became full with different kinds of businesses, including casinos, hotels, and restaurants. [[Topatz Shipping]] and [[Skypath Industries]] were two such businesses. [[Jontz Freight]] was a shipping company which operated in the Dravian Starport. With a standard Class 1 [[Hyperdrive/Legends|hyperdrive]], Dravian Spaceport was 16 days from [[Dreffon IV]], 2 days from [[Ather]], 23 days from [[Bazaar]], and 5 days from [[Vlemoth Port/Legends|Vlemoth Port]].
